name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly

labels: bug

## What happened

A clear description of what went wrong.

## What you expected to happen

What should have happened instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Click / select ...
3. See ...

## Which source or layer is affected

<!-- tick any that apply -->
- [ ] AIS positions
- [ ] NDBC buoys / ships
- [ ] NDBC wave / weather mesh
- [ ] Nav Warnings (NGA MIS)
- [ ] Broadcast Warnings (DailyMem)
- [ ] SMAPS advisories
- [ ] VIIRS thermal
- [ ] OpenSky aircraft
- [ ] NOTAMs
- [ ] Risk zone overlay
- [ ] Proximity query
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Intel tables (bottom panel)
- [ ] Source health panel
- [ ] Event detail panel
- [ ] Map interaction / zoom / pan
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Platform version

Current release shown in the footer, or state "unknown".

## Browser and OS

e.g. Chrome 123 / macOS 14, Safari iOS 17, Firefox 125 / Windows 11

## Console errors

Open browser DevTools (F12), go to the Console tab, paste any red errors here.

```
paste errors here
```

## Screenshot

If applicable, attach a screenshot showing the issue.

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant — time of day, whether a Re-collect helped, whether it resolved on next refresh, etc.
